text: Being here fills me with a quiet curiosity. The glass walls create a sense of openness, yet the barrier is felt. There’s a collective focus in the room behind the glass; I wonder about the ideas flowing inside. The R+D display in the second scene suggests an environment devoted to innovation and discovery, prompting me to reflect on the entanglement of intellect and creativity. I feel like an observer on the threshold of understanding, absorbing the ambience of inquiry and invention.
